text: Immersed in this museum or innovation center, I feel a curious anticipation. The environment is sharply modern, filled with glass, technology, and well-designed spaces. As I press forward toward the R+D display, the fusion of art, text, and interactive screens prompts me to ponder the relationship between humanity and machines. The intellectual energy here is palpable, and it compels me to reflect on the rapid dance between progress and contemplation, as if the walls hum with possibility and thoughtful resistance.
